title: Cozy Crumbly Russian Bulgur Wheat Pilaf
description: A hearty and comforting Russian dish made with bulgur wheat, featuring a fresh and crumbly texture, perfect for a cozy meal. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and carrots and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the bulgur wheat and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato paste, chicken broth, thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a salad, if desired.
